creator: nsonack@herrhotzenplotz.de
text:
> A test build causes an internal compiler error in clang (cool!):
    
Sigh...
    
> That said, please use full, unabbreviated git hashes for GH_TUPLE or
> ideally a tag if such exists.
    
Will do.
    
> Another issue I found is that the port is called firebird-emu but the
> upstream project is just firebird. Please check if you can perhaps make the
> port have the same name as the upstream project. That it's an emulator is
> already clear from the category. If you feel like the package name should
> have -emu, perhaps set PKGNAMESUFFIX=-emu.
    
My reasoning was: firebird is already taken for various flavours of the
firebird database (databases/firebirdXX-{client,server}). To avoid pkg name
collisions I used this portname. Afaics PKGNAMESUFFIX is used for
flavours/options of various ports, that is why I haven't used that either.
    
Tbh I would rename it to plain firebird since this collision doesn't exist
anymore - it's just a bit ambiguous at this point.
